case_title: DYE, WILLARD R. vs. HALL, NATHAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DYE, WILLARD R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALL, NATHAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 300 BUCHANAN ST #402, S.F.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYE, WILLARD R. AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, NATHAN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
COST BILL, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL COST $130.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYE, WILLARD R.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $17.05 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYE, WILLARD R.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, NATHAN
DECLARATION OF WILLIAM R.DYE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYE, WILLARD R.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, NATHAN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYE, WILLARD R. SERVED MAY-15-1995, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, NATHAN
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYE, WILLARD R. AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, NATHAN

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $130.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYE, WILLARD R. AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, NATHAN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DYE, WILLARD R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALL, NATHAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 6/14/95 $2,284.70 RENT, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,414.70, LEASE FORFEITED
